allow: Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(json.dumps\(d['pagination'],indent=2\)\); print\(d['data'][0]['titulo'] if d['data'] else 'no data'\)")

Bash(node -e "const j=JSON.parse\(require\('fs'\).readFileSync\('C:/Users/hugos/tmp/obras.json','utf8'\)\); j.data.forEach\(d => { const c=JSON.parse\(d.copyright_chains\); console.log\('=== '+d.concord_code+' / '+d.titulo+' ==='\); console.log\(JSON.stringify\(c,null,2\)\); console.log\(\); }\)")

Bash(node -e "process.stdin.setEncoding\('utf8'\); let d=''; process.stdin.on\('data',c=>d+=c\); process.stdin.on\('end',\(\)=>{const j=JSON.parse\(d\); console.log\('Success:', j.success\); console.log\('Columns:', Object.keys\(j.data[0]\).join\(', '\)\); console.log\('Total:', j.pagination.total\)}\)")
